title: Is there a way to filter out subitems in cards dashboard?
excerpt:
Hello! 
I’m currently using the cards widget in a dashboard connected to a board, but I cannot seem to filter our subitems, which is ridiculous cause I’d think its pretty easy to understand for everyone that subitems and…

posts.author: paupau (Pau)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!
I’m currently using the cards widget in a dashboard connected to a board, but I cannot seem to filter our subitems, which is ridiculous cause I’d think its pretty easy to understand for everyone that subitems and items are uses for different levels of hierarchy.

Am I missing some filter or setting??
Thanks

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @paupau !

You can filter subitems on the card widget.

image945×719 39.2 KB

image479×572 14.6 KB

Kind reminder you have to filter for each board connected to the dashboard/widget.

Please let me know if this is what you are looking for!

Cheers,
Giannis, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com

posts.author: paupau (Pau)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi GiannisKoukounas!

Thanks for responding, my issue is that I want no subitems to show in the dashboard, and if I filter out all subitems under one item, that item disappears.

Thank you!

posts.author: paupau (Pau)
posts.cookedHtml: It’d be game changer of someone could help me with this, thanks guys!
